payload.detail: T-7 built executable: lint exit 0 (0 diagnostics), tsgo exit 0, vitest 5/5, smoke exit 0 (round 2 printed), check-t7.mjs 12/12 pass exit 0. API surprise: lint rule no-direct-flow-composition forbids ctx.exec({flow:child}) inside flows; must use deps:{child:controller(childFlow)}+child.exec(). Tarball sha256 16001d130626e01b58d178c28f32250000dfb830b8df5620a02d690cefaee58a. Side observation: pkg/tool/lint/dist/cli.mjs mtime changed mid-run (concurrent process); gate still 0-diagnostic after retry.

T-7 executable eval task complete. Reference gates: lint exit 0 (3 files, 0 diagnostics, --max-warnings 0), tsgo --noEmit exit 0, vitest run exit 0 (5/5), tsx bin/main.ts exit 0 (prints round 2), check-t7.mjs exit 0 (12/12 pass). Adversarial: transplant fails 10/12 checks (exit 1), syntax-mimicry fake fails 3/12 (b6, b6b, b8; exit 1) — checker has teeth against both mandated attacks. Ownership semantics corrected per library: current-owned, sibling execs on one parent distinct, nested share (scope.test.ts:1151-1239). API surprises: no-direct-flow-composition forces deps:{child:controller(childFlow)}; no-untyped-throw forces faults:typed<F>()+ctx.fail; parse:typed<void>() for no-input flows; commit-seq numbers must be assigned in onClose. Cost: ~40min total, ~20-25min marginal per additional task. Artifacts + verbatim gate logs under workers/dkr-5/ (gates/, adversarial/*/verdict.json). Tarball sha256 16001d130626e01b58d178c28f32250000dfb830b8df5620a02d690cefaee58a.
DKR-5 single-task executable-eval spike begun; reading chal verdicts + lite semantics
